title: The global economy continues to navigate a patchy recovery
section_path: The global economy continues to navigate a patchy recovery
section_path_text: The global economy continues to navigate a patchy recovery
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
As the global economy continues to navigate a patchy recovery, the dry bulk market found some footing this week, with the Baltic indices providing a degree of resilience amid otherwise fragile macro conditions. Leading the charge, the Baltic Capesize Index neared its highest level for the year, before easing slightly to $23,572 per day. The Panamax segment, which had briefly slipped below five-digits for the first time since early March, recovered sharply by week's end, settling at $11,210 per day.
